title: Better Bubbles
description: Improves the oxygen bar on the hotbar!
body:
Adds "empty bubbles" to the air meter when submerged, and a cool sound effect for when a bubble pops, increasing in pitch the lower the air meter is! _\*pop\*_

**EDIT 10/8/24:**
Mojang just implemented this in 1.21.2. Into the archives you go.
